recommendations.title: The Land Before Time II: The Great Valley Adventure
recommendations.overview: This time, while building a hideaway in their new home of the Great Valley, Littlefoot and the gang rescue a mysterious egg from two scheming egg-nappers and make a starling surprise - and new friend - when the egg hatches.

recommendations.title: Ice Age
recommendations.overview: Manny the mammoth, Sid the loquacious sloth, and Diego the sabre-toothed tiger go on a comical quest to return a human baby back to his father, across a world on the brink of an ice age.

recommendations.title: Ice Age: A Mammoth Christmas
recommendations.overview: When Sid accidentally destroys Manny's heirloom Christmas rock and ends up on Santa's naughty list, he leads a hilarious quest to the North Pole to make things right and ends up making things much worse. Now it's up to Manny and his prehistoric posse

recommendations.title: The Jetsons Meet the Flintstones
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Science Fiction, TV Movie, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Elroy Jetson invents a time machine that takes him back to prehistoric times, where he meets the Flintstone family.

recommendations.title: The Lake
recommendations.overview: A little girl brings back the big egg she finds by a nearby lake to her home. However, the egg belongs to a mysterious and dangerous creature, and it soon starts searching for it.

recommendations.title: Robot Chicken: Star Wars
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Science Fiction, Action, TV Movie, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: A series of 30 sketches, following the hilarious antics of various characters from a galaxy, far, far away.

recommendations.title: Ice Age: The Meltdown
recommendations.overview: Diego, Manny and Sid return in this sequel to the hit animated movie Ice Age. This time around, the deep freeze is over, and the ice-covered earth is starting to melt, which will destroy the trio's cherished valley. The impending disaster prompts the

recommendations.title: Shooom's Odyssey
recommendations.overview: Shooom, a baby owl, hatches just as a storm turns the bayou surrounding her tree upside down. No sooner has she fallen from her nest, then the little fledgling totters off into the mangrove, pushing a second egg from the brood along with her. Come he
recommendations.director: Sonja Rohelder, Julien Bisaro, Carol Freeman

recommendations.title: Ice Age: Dawn of the Dinosaurs
recommendations.overview: Times are changing for Manny the moody mammoth, Sid the motor mouthed sloth and Diego the crafty saber-toothed tiger. Life heats up for our heroes when they meet some new and none-too-friendly neighbors – the mighty dinosaurs.

recommendations.title: Ice Age: Collision Course
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Animation, Family, Comedy, Science Fiction
